description: Love Torture Records is a small net-label/ DIY label run out of Northridge, CA, interested in releasing experimental electronic music. There are also a few super-limited physical releases available on www.myspace.com/lovetorturerecords or www.lovetorturerecords.tk Love Torture Records myspace page Love Torture Records last.fm page [LTR000] Endometrium Cuntplow- Torch Her Lovely EP [LTR001] Fbrz- Devices [LTR002] I Killed Techno!- Bring The Noisekore [LTR003] RedSK- Mollusk EP [LTR004] The Insect Explosion- Erase History [LTR005] Havoc On Fire vs. Endometrium Cuntplow - Cunts On Fire Split [LTR006] Endometrium Cuntplow vs. Buzzardhawk - Go Banana ...Split [LTR007] A Touch Of Death - EP [LTR008] A Touch Of Death - The Making Of Mechanical Shit [LTR009] Plaid Colored vs. Endometrium Cuntplow - Cosmonaut Kittens Form Constantinople [LTR010] Barbarian Borderline - Zytotoxizität [LTR011] RedSK vs. endometrium cuntplow vs. Vloosie [LTR012] CK'GX - Fame Whore's Reflection [LTR013] endometrium cuntplow - Treekiller!
